name: Kale and Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the garlic sausage until cooked and sliced.
2. Peel and chop the potatoes.
3. Combine the chopped potatoes with vegetable oil and water in a pot. Bring to a boil and cook for 20-30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender.
4. Remove the potatoes from the pot and reserve the liquid.
5. Mash the potatoes through a sieve and return them to the reserved potato liquid.
6. Add salt and pepper, then simmer for 20 minutes.
7. Wash the kale and discard any tough leaves. Cut into shreds.
8. Add the kale to the soup and cook for an additional 25 minutes.
9. Add the sausage and gently simmer for 5 more minutes.
